channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-20
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates to both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing` projects. The `scienceverse/metacheck` project now boasts JAPS support for jamovi, thanks to Lakens' contributions to the `data_check` branch. Meanwhile, the `marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing` project has seen improvements to its website and documentation, including updates to the `gh-pages` branch and refinements to wording and formatting on the `master` branch, courtesy of Anka and Alex O. Holcombe. These developments demonstrate the power of collaboration and highlight the connections between our projects, as researchers work together to advance open-source research tools. As our community continues to grow and evolve, we celebrate these achievements and look forward to seeing the impact of these updates on the broader research landscape.

28 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
tenzing7 commits
metacheck6 commits
regcheck6 commits
